title: ortholoma alienum
side_effects: Ortholoma alienum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Prolonged exposure to its volatile compounds can also cause nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of the plant has been linked to respiratory issues, including shortness of breath and bronchitis. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any part of the Ortholoma alienum plant for health purposes.
